description.value:
Category: Clan
Prerequisites: Oshi Clan, Level 16+, Greedy Idol

You've become so adept at your craft that few others can even hope to compare, a fact that you constantly display with your every move. You gain the following benefits:

  • Your Starry-Eyed Lies clan feature's rest limit is doubled, and creatures that you can see are always treated as being able to see them.

  • Your Invincible Smile clan feature can be reactivated as a free action, a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier per long rest.

  • Creatures Overcharmed by you remain as such until they complete a long rest, and the DC required to break a creature free increases by +5.

  • Creatures not hostile to you are treated as if they have 3 ranks of the Charmed condition against you.

  • Twice per rest, when a Fan would fail a saving throw caused by an Oshi Hijutsu, you can select one keyword they have access to. For the duration of that Hijutsu, they lose access to that keyword, becoming unable to use anything reliant on it, and you gain it. All of your Oshi Hijutsu gain that keyword, and you gain 1 of their jutsu with that keyword. If the duration was instant, this lasts for 1d4 rounds. If you would gain a keyword you already have access to, increase your DC with that keyword by +1, and any damage or healing done by 1 step. Only one keyword may be gained in this way at a time.
